title: (4-Pack) Assorted Scented Candle Set in Glass Cup Jar | Fresh Linen, Berry, Vanilla, Lavender, 3 Oz, (GLASS4)
features: SOOTHING: Create a luxurious spa experience with the soothing aromas of these richly scented candles
LONG-LASTING: With a total burn time of 17 hours, these scented candles efficiently preserve fragrance so you can enjoy them for longer
AROMATHERAPY: A range of uplifting fragrances with aromaetherapy properties to relieve stress and tension and help you get a better night's sleep
MULTIPLE FRAGRANCES: This assorted set of scented candles includes a range of calming fragrances to suit all tastes
HEAT-RESISTANT: A simply designed heat-resistant glass jar ensures total safety when handling
description: From the manufacturer Fill the room with one of our uplifting scents. From fresh linen to berry royale, we have a range that includes everyones favourites. Perfect for some me-time. Create a relaxing aroma that will help you unwind and create a positive state of mind. Style with other ornaments to create a stylish, cosy look. Choose from our range of different colours, shapes and sizes to suit your home. Set the mood with candle light. Candles create a calming ambience, ideal for the dinner table and cosy nights in.
